title: Autumnity - Spawn Compat
description: Remove duplicate items, blocks and entities with the goal of integrating both Autumnity and Spawn so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of this mod is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent item.**
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Mobs
- Spawn Snail
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Spawn Escargot (not duplicated but removed because textures don't match and I can't modify them because of the mod license)
- Spawn Potted Sweet Berries (not duplicated but removed because textures don't match and I can't modify them because of the mod license)
- Spawn Mucus
- Spawn Snail Eggs
- Spawn Snail Shell
### Removed Duplicate Blocks
- Spawn Big Snail Shell
- Spawn Snail Eggs
- Spawn Snail Shell Tiles
- Spawn Snail Shell Tile Slab
- Spawn Snail Shell Tile Stairs
- Autumnity Snail Goo Block
### Crafting Recipe Adjustments
- Spawn Mucus Block: Now crafted using Autumnity Snail Goo
- Autumnity Snail Goo: Now crafted using Spawn Mucus Block
